ops.title: cc-pushback is a 5-stage pipeline — detectors → LLM triage → LLM refine → LLM enrich (code evidence in shared ledger) → export (HF dataset) → dashboard
ops.body:
cc-pushback is a **three-stage pipeline** (as of 2026-06-11). Stage 1 (the 4 detectors
→ `feedback_events`, high recall) feeds **stage 2**: an LLM judge (`cc_pushback/triage.py`)
that classifies every candidate pushback-vs-noise via `spawnllm` driving the headless
`claude` CLI with a pydantic `Verdict` (structured output). **Stage 3** is the
**refiner** (`cc_pushback/refine.py`): for each judge-accepted event it re-synthesizes
what Claude did and splits the user message into one-or-more **atomic** training pairs
`{action, complaint_verbatim, complaint}` (a `Refinement`/`RefinedPair` pydantic model,
`pairs` list `min_length=1`). The **deliverable is the DB itself** — the `refined_pairs`
SQL view (`{action → complaint}`, latest refiner generation per event wins). The old
`training_pairs` view was renamed `accepted_pushback` and is now the refiner's INPUT
(judge-accepted events, carrying `context_json`); the judge's `what_claude_did` stays
produced but no longer flows into the deliverable. ~471 accepted candidates as of
2026-06-11 (blessed judge = v3, refine `PROMPT_VERSION` = 1).

Key pieces: `triage.py` (versioned `JUDGE_PROMPT`/`PROMPT_VERSION` + blind
`AUDIT_PROMPT`/`AUDIT_VERSION`, seeded stratified audit sampler), `evaluate.py`
(golden-gate at `cc_pushback/golden_triage.json`, audited precision/contamination
with exact Clopper-Pearson bound, flip analysis; `eval` now surfaces the judge
`rationale` on golden failures + disagreements), `store.py` `triage` table keyed
`UNIQUE(dedup_key, role, prompt_version, model)` + `refinement` table keyed
`UNIQUE(dedup_key, prompt_version, model, pair_index)` (atomic per-event executemany in
a transaction; `INSERT OR IGNORE`, the `unrefined` LEFT-JOIN-IS-NULL gate is the real
idempotency) so both survive DB rebuilds. CLI: `triage` / `audit` / `eval` / `refine` /
`pairs`. Trigger context carries real tool inputs via cc-transcript's
`ContextTurn.tool_inputs` (0.7.1+). See [[cc-pushback-ecosystem-map]].

**Stage 4 = enrich** (`cc_pushback/enrich.py`, `ENRICH_VERSION=1`): grounds each refined
pair in the code edit its complaint faults. **Refactored (as of 2026-06) to write to the
shared `~/.cc-transcript/corrections.db` ledger via `cc_transcript.extract.extract_correction`
— the old local `pair_evidence` table is GONE.** `view-samples` (FastAPI dashboard,
`dashboard.py`) joins the ledger by anchor at serve time (`evidence_resolver` →
`EvidenceRow.from_correction`); `/api/pairs` carries evidence, but the `pairs` CLI /
`refined_pairs` view do NOT. **Gotcha: enrich "pending" has a nonzero floor by design** —
a pair whose complaint faults no harvestable edit (plan objection, terse rejection,
expired transcript) resolves to a *skip* that writes nothing to the ledger, so it stays
"pending" forever. Do NOT loop enrich to `0 pending`; the real convergence signal is
corrections-per-pass trickling to ~0 (`failed=0` means no retryable work). The extractor
is idempotent per anchor, so one correction covers all pairs sharing that anchor (rebuild
2026-06-18 at opus tier: 1210 candidates → 534 accepted → 856 pairs → 668 grounded by 577
corrections, 188 code-less floor). `PENDING_CAP` was removed from `cli.py` (commit 33db383)
— a full local+mirror rebuild intentionally exceeds the old 1200-row guard.

**Tuning loop** (autonomous): judge → opus-audit a stratified sample → eval gates
(golden 100%, precision ≥.95, contamination ≤.05, collateral flips ≤10%) → adjudicate
every judge↔auditor disagreement by hand (the auditor is a proxy, ~half its
disagreements are its own errors) → revise prompt, bump version. The judge oscillates:
teaching it to find implicit faults in directives (v2) made it over-fire on plain
forward/preventive directives (v3→v4), and v4's fix over-corrected and regressed —
**the precision/recall frontier is real; pick the best version, don't chase a clean
mechanical .95 past it.** Per-row verdict persistence makes every rate-limit-killed
pass idempotently resumable (`triage` just re-runs over whatever's still unjudged).
